_setup: 1. Go to notion.so/my-integrations → Create new integration 2. Give it a name like 'Claude Code' 3. Copy the Internal Integration Secret (starts with ntn_) 4. In Notion, go to each page/database you want Claude to access → Click '...' menu → Connections → Add your integration 5. Without step 4, Claude won't be able to see anything even with a valid key
_examples: Search my Notion for client meeting notes
List all pages in my workspace
Read my SOPs page in Notion
